name: Calculate Student Count
Fetch Students for ID Card
Fetch Students for Promote
Apply Student Promotion
Calculate Home Schedule Student Count
Fetch Attendance Summary
Filter Home Schedule Portal
Filter Test Schedule Portal
Create Student Portal User
script:
if doc.create_user and doc.portal_email: is_new_user = not frappe.db.exists('User', doc.portal_email) if is_new_user: password = frappe.generate_hash(length=10) user = frappe.get_doc({ 'doctype': 'User', 'email': doc.portal_email, 'first_name': doc.first_name or doc.full_name, 'last_name': doc.last_name or '', 'enabled': 1, 'user_type': 'Website User', 'send_welcome_email': 0, 'new_password': password, 'roles': [{'role': 'Student Portal'}, {'role': 'All'}] }) user.insert(ignore_permissions=True) frappe.sendmail( recipients=[doc.portal_email], subject='Welcome to Student Portal', message='''

Welcome to Student Portal

Dear ''' + (doc.first_name or doc.full_name) + ''',

Your student portal account has been created. Here are your login details:

Portal URL: http://127.0.0.1:8002/portal-login

Email: ''' + doc.portal_email + '''

Password: ''' + password + '''

Please keep your login details safe.

''', now=True ) frappe.msgprint('Portal user created and welcome email sent to ' + doc.portal_email) else: user = frappe.get_doc('User', doc.portal_email) existing_roles = [r.role for r in user.roles] if 'Student Portal' not in existing_roles: user.append('roles', {'role': 'Student Portal'}) user.save(ignore_permissions=True) frappe.msgprint('Student Portal role added to ' + doc.portal_email)

name: Auto Create Class Result
Send Student Portal Credentials
script:
if doc.portal_email and doc.create_user: password = doc.first_name[:2].upper() + doc.last_name[:2].lower() + "2024!" if not frappe.db.exists("User", doc.portal_email): user = frappe.get_doc({ "doctype": "User", "email": doc.portal_email, "first_name": doc.first_name or doc.full_name, "last_name": doc.last_name or "", "enabled": 1, "new_password": password, "send_welcome_email": 0, "roles": [{"role": "Student Portal"}] }) user.insert(ignore_permissions=True) else: user = frappe.get_doc("User", doc.portal_email) user.new_password = password user.save(ignore_permissions=True) frappe.sendmail( recipients=[doc.portal_email], subject="Your Student Portal Login Credentials", message="

Dear " + (doc.full_name or doc.first_name) + ",

Your portal login details:

Email: " + doc.portal_email + "

Password: " + password + "

Please change your password after first login.

", now=True )
